summary: Completed comprehensive testing of student registration system. Backend APIs working perfectly (10/10 tests passed). Frontend flows working well with one minor UI issue identified.

ui_bugs.issue: Payment button is not disabled when no T-shirt size is selected initially
ui_bugs.details: Button should be disabled until T-shirt size is selected, but appears enabled on first load

passed_tests: Login flow with valid credentials (Student ID: 3336, Email: sean43@hotmail.com)
Invalid login error handling with proper error messages
Student data retrieval and display on dashboard
T-shirt size dropdown selection and saving
Admin statistics display (200 total students, 0 completed, $0 revenue)
Admin student list display and search functionality
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix payment button state management - ensure button is disabled when no T-shirt size is selected initially. The button should only be enabled after a T-shirt size is selected.
